title: Harden numeric budget preflight before release metadata rebinding
outOfScope: Starting the original plan Work Items

sources.reason: Preflight compares policy limits and declared projections but currently ignores numeric limits parsed from the repository YAML subset.
Archive mutation gate must enforce the same projected archive-growth limit before creating immutable evidence.
Existing budget preflight regression coverage; add the policy-string numeric regression.
Existing archive-growth reservation coverage; add the policy-string numeric regression.
Current archiveGrowth ceiling is 492 while this corrective Work Item adds the next immutable archive record.
Authoritative predecessor closure evidence and current archive sequence.

riskAssessment.reason: A false negative in a budget gate permits an over-limit archive or implementation to proceed; the fix is bounded to policy parsing and regression coverage.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized root-cause process correction before any release retry; the affected gates and regression scenarios are explicit.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Numeric policy limits are enforced by budget preflight even when the repository YAML subset returns them as strings.
Archive mutation rejects a projected archiveGrowth overrun under the same string-valued policy representation.
Regression tests cover both pre-implementation budget checks and pre-archive mutation checks.
The archiveGrowth and pythonLines ceilings and repayment ledger reserve this Work Item's measured growth without rewriting prior evidence.
The complete Finish Gate, PR, merge, ai-close-work-item, branch cleanup, and synchronized-base evidence is recorded.
guidelines: Keep budget parsing fail closed; malformed or non-numeric policy limits must not silently disable enforcement.
Preserve immutable archived evidence and do not generate release metadata in this corrective Work Item.

intent.problem: The repository's YAML subset parses numeric governance limits as strings. The budget preflight and archive reservation code then use integer-only checks, so archiveGrowth and other numeric ceilings can be silently skipped before expensive CI or immutable archive mutation.
constraints: Fix the process gate before resuming release metadata or publication.
Keep malformed limits fail closed and preserve existing approved overrun semantics.
Do not rewrite archived Contracts, Summaries, manifests, or release evidence.
The policy increase must be bounded to the measured next archive record and explicitly linked to this Work Item.
intent.rationale: Normalizing numeric policy values at the two budget enforcement boundaries closes the observed false-negative path without changing unrelated YAML consumers; regression tests make the preflight guarantee executable before release retries.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized root-cause process correction before resuming release.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Preflight rejects an expected pythonLines or archiveGrowth value above a string-valued policy maximum.
Archive mutation rejects projected archiveGrowth above a string-valued policy maximum before writing evidence.
The policy reservation admits exactly the projected archive sequence 493 and records repayment ownership.

rawUserRequest: 发现发布流程问题时先停止发布并从根本上改善流程；预算上限不足、格式化和重复 CI 等问题必须固化为事前硬门禁。完成修正后再继续完整 Contract/Preflight/PR/合并/ai-close-work-item 流程。

declaredIntent.summary: Make numeric governance budget limits enforceable before implementation and before immutable archive mutation.
